race.description: The Les Twentyman OAM Memorial 0-62 Hcp
race.comment: DRAGON SCROLL (7) resumed with a narrow maiden win at Gosford when jumping $1.85, scoring by a head. This is a bit of a step up but she's lightly raced and should go on with it for strong connections. SIERRA BLANCA (14) has been thereabouts her past couple and should get a good run midfield, she can add some value to exotics at a big price for the Meech/Dabernig combination. CATCH IT KISS IT (6) won her maiden on debut at Mornington. She was big odds there but has to be given a live chance this time around.  ETERNAL DARKNESS (1) can mix his form but certainly has claims on best figures while the upside of RAY DEL NORTE (2) has to be respected for the Freedman yard off a Colac maiden win last time in.
